staleness.summary_surface: Header source line and stale warning

lane_status.canonical_surface: Header dark/stale lane counters and lane status rows
lane_status.summary_surface: Summary export caveat plus lane-status counts and top lane rows

live_source_config.canonical_surface: Operator Status live-fetch configuration pill and warning panel
live_source_config.summary_surface: Operator Status live-fetch configuration pill and warning panel

actions.summary_surface: Today's actions when non-empty; summary/export caveat when empty or dark lanes exist

action_decision_groups.canonical_surface: Today's Actions grouped into Key Now, Important Backlog, Re-check Before Acting, and Quiet Watch
action_decision_groups.summary_surface: Grouped action sections with expandable rationale drawers

fresh_signals.canonical_surface: Fresh signal cards and action context
fresh_signals.summary_surface: Fresh Signals card when non-empty, capped to summary rows

signal_log.canonical_surface: Signal Log watch-only lane in Action view
signal_log.summary_surface: Signal Log watch-only card when non-empty, capped to summary rows

event_risk.canonical_surface: Event Risk lane status plus promoted Today's Actions review prompts
event_risk.summary_surface: Lane-status summary only; promoted actions render in Today's actions

holdings.canonical_surface: Book tab holdings with conviction detail expanders

catalysts.summary_surface: Catalyst list when non-empty; empty/not-checked distinction is incomplete

questions.canonical_surface: Currently static CURATED.questions fallback; feed emits empty list

research.canonical_surface: Research panel with live rows or curated fallback

research_actions.summary_surface: From Research card when non-empty, using action-card summary rendering

radar.summary_surface: Opportunity Context summary, capped top rows

lean_in.canonical_surface: Lean In lane and action-promotion source

bullish_flow.summary_surface: Opportunity Context summary, capped top rows

prospects.canonical_surface: Top Prospects lane and action-promotion source
prospects.summary_surface: Opportunity Context summary, capped top rows

asymmetric_opportunities.canonical_surface: Asymmetric Opportunities lane in the Action view
asymmetric_opportunities.summary_surface: Asymmetric Opportunities card, one deduped row per ticker

operator_hardening.canonical_surface: Operator Hardening panels for freshness downgrades, stale-action cleanup, pre-action condition checks, and watch-only rationale
operator_hardening.summary_surface: Operator Hardening cards in the summary dashboard

target_drift.canonical_surface: Target Drift panel in the Action view
target_drift.summary_surface: Opportunity Context summary, capped top rows

portfolio_views.canonical_surface: Book tab account views and effective ETF look-through estimates when account_positions.json exists
portfolio_views.summary_surface: Portfolio Views card when account-position views are present

source_audits.canonical_surface: Source Proof panel with cloud routine, connector, Fundstrat, and Notion/writeback evidence
